# Q: <the question, phrased as a question>

- **Topic:** <topic name> ([index](./README.md))

- **Opened:** YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ
- **Resolved:** YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ or —
- **Decision:** <link to docs/decisions/...> or —

Why this question came up. One short paragraph.
